properties.displayName: System Information Discovery - ipconfig  hostname  net config executions
properties.description: Detect execution of common network/host discovery commands such as ipconfig, hostname or net config which can be used to enumerate host and network configuration.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (CommandLine|contains has "ipconfig" or CommandLine|contains has "ipconfig /all" or CommandLine|contains has "hostname" or CommandLine|contains has "net config" or CommandLine|contains has "net view") and (Image|endswith has "\ipconfig.exe" or Image|endswith has "\hostname.exe" or Image|endswith has "\net.exe")
